message:
fix(security): use saturating_add for priority counter in intent_firewall default_policy (bd-1qkfg)

The `priority += 1` in both loop bodies of `TrafficPolicy::default_policy()` violated
the project hardening standard requiring saturating_add for ALL counter arithmetic.
While overflow is practically impossible (max 10 iterations on a u32), this aligns
the code with the codebase-wide hardening invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
